Built with Alectryon. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
From HoTT.Basics Require Import Overture Equivalences Tactics.From HoTT.Basics Require Import Overture Equivalences Tactics.
From HoTT.WildCat Require Import Core SetoidRewrite AbEnriched EpiStable.
From HoTT.Spaces Require Import Nat.Core Finite.Fin.

Local Open Scope mc_add_scope.

(** * Homological algebra *)

(** Various "diagram lemmas" are proved, usually assuming the wild category satisfies [IsAbEpiStable].  The proofs use the diagram chasing method provided by WildCat.EpiStable. *)

(** We will often use the convention that a map [bc : B $-> C] is named as the juxtaposition of the domain and codomain.  When we want to highlight the importance of certain maps, they will be given different names. *)

(** ** The weak four lemmas *)

Section FourLemma.

  Context {A : Type} `{IsAbEpiStable A}.

  Context {B C D E B' C' D' E' : A}
    (bc : B $-> C) (cd : C $-> D) (de : D $-> E)
    (bc' : B' $-> C') (cd' : C' $-> D') (de' : D' $-> E')
    (g : B $-> B') (h : C $-> C') (i : D $-> D') (j : E $-> E')
    (sq2 : h $o bc $== bc' $o g) (sq3 : i $o cd $== cd' $o h)
    (sq4 : j $o de $== de' $o i)
    `{!CatIsAbExact cd de} `{!CatIsAbExact bc' cd'} `{!Epic g} `{!Monic j}.

  (** The diagram has the following shape:
<<
  B ---> C ---> D ---> E
  |      |      |      v
  |g     |h     |i     |j
  v      |      |      |
  v      v      v      v
  B' --> C' --> D' --> E'
>>
  The common assumptions are that the map [B $-> B'] is epi, the map [E $-> E'] is mono, and the sequences [C $-> D] + [D $-> E] and [B' $-> C'] + [C' $-> D'] are exact. *)

  (** If in addition the composite of [C' $-> D'] and [D' $-> C'] is zero and the map [D $-> D'] is epi, then the map [C $-> C'] is epi. *)
  
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
B, C, D, E, B', C', D', E': A
bc: B $-> C
cd: C $-> D
de: D $-> E
bc': B' $-> C'
cd': C' $-> D'
de': D' $-> E'
g: B $-> B'
h: C $-> C'
i: D $-> D'
j: E $-> E'
sq2: h $o bc $== bc' $o g
sq3: i $o cd $== cd' $o h
sq4: j $o de $== de' $o i
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact cd de
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact bc' cd'
Epic0: Epic g
Monic0: Monic j
complex_cde': de' $o cd' $== 0
Epic1: Epic i
Epic h

  
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
B, C, D, E, B', C', D', E': A
bc: B $-> C
cd: C $-> D
de: D $-> E
bc': B' $-> C'
cd': C' $-> D'
de': D' $-> E'
g: B $-> B'
h: C $-> C'
i: D $-> D'
j: E $-> E'
sq2: h $o bc $== bc' $o g
sq3: i $o cd $== cd' $o h
sq4: j $o de $== de' $o i
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact cd de
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact bc' cd'
Epic0: Epic g
Monic0: Monic j
complex_cde': de' $o cd' $== 0
Epic1: Epic i
Epic h

    (* To show that [h : C $-> C'] is epi, we must show that an arbitrary generalized element [c' : elt P C'] lifts along [h : C $-> C']. *)
    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
B, C, D, E, B', C', D', E': A
bc: B $-> C
cd: C $-> D
de: D $-> E
bc': B' $-> C'
cd': C' $-> D'
de': D' $-> E'
g: B $-> B'
h: C $-> C'
i: D $-> D'
j: E $-> E'
sq2: h $o bc $== bc' $o g
sq3: i $o cd $== cd' $o h
sq4: j $o de $== de' $o i
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact cd de
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact bc' cd'
Epic0: Epic g
Monic0: Monic j
complex_cde': de' $o cd' $== 0
Epic1: Epic i
P: A
c': elt P C'
Lift c' h


    (* Since the map [i : D $-> D'] is assumed epi, we can lift the element [cd' $o c' : elt P D'] to an element [d : elt _ D].  [ld] will be the name given to the proof that [d] is a lift. *)
    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
B, C, D, E, B', C', D', E': A
bc: B $-> C
cd: C $-> D
de: D $-> E
bc': B' $-> C'
cd': C' $-> D'
de': D' $-> E'
g: B $-> B'
h: C $-> C'
i: D $-> D'
j: E $-> E'
sq2: h $o bc $== bc' $o g
sq3: i $o cd $== cd' $o h
sq4: j $o de $== de' $o i
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact cd de
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact bc' cd'
Epic0: Epic g
Monic0: Monic j
complex_cde': de' $o cd' $== 0
Epic1: Epic i
P: A
d: elt P D
c': elt P C'
ld: i $o d $== cd' $o c'
Lift c' h


    (* Using exactness of the top row, we can further lift the element [d] to an element [c : elt _ C].  This step involves verifying that [d] is mapped to zero by [de : D $-> E], which requires the map [j] to be mono. *)
    (* We clear 2-cells and elements when they are no longer needed, to speed up the lifts.  The [using clear] clause is applied *after* the hypothesis is proved. *)
    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
B, C, D, E, B', C', D', E': A
bc: B $-> C
cd: C $-> D
de: D $-> E
bc': B' $-> C'
cd': C' $-> D'
de': D' $-> E'
g: B $-> B'
h: C $-> C'
i: D $-> D'
j: E $-> E'
sq2: h $o bc $== bc' $o g
sq3: i $o cd $== cd' $o h
sq4: j $o de $== de' $o i
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact cd de
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact bc' cd'
Epic0: Epic g
Monic0: Monic j
complex_cde': de' $o cd' $== 0
Epic1: Epic i
P: A
d: elt P D
c': elt P C'
ld: i $o d $== cd' $o c'
de $o d $== 0
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
B, C, D, E, B', C', D', E': A
bc: B $-> C
cd: C $-> D
de: D $-> E
bc': B' $-> C'
cd': C' $-> D'
de': D' $-> E'
g: B $-> B'
h: C $-> C'
i: D $-> D'
j: E $-> E'
sq2: h $o bc $== bc' $o g
sq3: i $o cd $== cd' $o h
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact cd de
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact bc' cd'
Epic0: Epic g
Monic0: Monic j
Epic1: Epic i
P: A
c': elt P C'
d: elt P D
ld: i $o d $== cd' $o c'
c: elt P C
lc: cd $o c $== d
Lift c' h

IsGraph0: IsGraph A

Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
B, C, D, E, B', C', D', E': A
bc: B $-> C

de: D $-> E

de': D' $-> E'

j: E $-> E'
sq2: h $o bc $== bc' $o g
sq3: i $o cd $== cd' $o h
sq4: j $o de $== de' $o i
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact cd de
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact bc' cd'
Epic0: Epic g
Monic0: Monic j
complex_cde': de' $o cd' $== 0

d: elt P D
c': elt P C'
ld: i $o d $== cd' $o c'
de $o d $== 0

      apply precomp_zero. 
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
B, C, D, E, B', C', D', E': A
bc: B $-> C
cd: C $-> D
de: D $-> E
bc': B' $-> C'
cd': C' $-> D'
de': D' $-> E'
g: B $-> B'
h: C $-> C'
i: D $-> D'
j: E $-> E'
sq2: h $o bc $== bc' $o g
sq3: i $o cd $== cd' $o h
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact cd de
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact bc' cd'
Epic0: Epic g
Monic0: Monic j
Epic1: Epic i
P: A
c': elt P C'
d: elt P D
ld: i $o d $== cd' $o c'
c: elt P C
lc: cd $o c $== d
Lift c' h


    (* The element [c] is not necessarily the correct lift of [c'].  We correct this by lifting the element [c' - h $o c] using exactness of the bottom row. This yields an element [b' : elt _ B']. *)
    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
B, C, D, E, B', C', D', E': A
bc: B $-> C
cd: C $-> D
de: D $-> E
bc': B' $-> C'
cd': C' $-> D'
de': D' $-> E'
g: B $-> B'
h: C $-> C'
i: D $-> D'
j: E $-> E'
sq2: h $o bc $== bc' $o g
sq3: i $o cd $== cd' $o h
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact cd de
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact bc' cd'
Epic0: Epic g
Monic0: Monic j
Epic1: Epic i
P: A
c': elt P C'
d: elt P D
ld: i $o d $== cd' $o c'
c: elt P C
lc: cd $o c $== d
cd' $o (c' - h $o c) $== 0
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
B, C, D, E, B', C', D', E': A
bc: B $-> C
cd: C $-> D
de: D $-> E
bc': B' $-> C'
cd': C' $-> D'
de': D' $-> E'
g: B $-> B'
h: C $-> C'
i: D $-> D'
j: E $-> E'
sq2: h $o bc $== bc' $o g
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact cd de
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact bc' cd'
Epic0: Epic g
Monic0: Monic j
Epic1: Epic i
P: A
b': elt P B'
c: elt P C
c': elt P C'
lb': bc' $o b' $== c' - h $o c
Lift c' h

H0: IsAbEpiStable A

      apply inverse_r_0gpd. 
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
B, C, D, E, B', C', D', E': A
bc: B $-> C
cd: C $-> D
de: D $-> E
bc': B' $-> C'
cd': C' $-> D'
de': D' $-> E'
g: B $-> B'
h: C $-> C'
i: D $-> D'
j: E $-> E'
sq2: h $o bc $== bc' $o g
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact cd de
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact bc' cd'
Epic0: Epic g
Monic0: Monic j
Epic1: Epic i
P: A
b': elt P B'
c: elt P C
c': elt P C'
lb': bc' $o b' $== c' - h $o c
Lift c' h


    (* Since we know that the map [g : B $-> B'] is epi, we can lift [b'] to an element [b : elt _ B]. *)
    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
B, C, D, E, B', C', D', E': A
bc: B $-> C
cd: C $-> D
de: D $-> E
bc': B' $-> C'
cd': C' $-> D'
de': D' $-> E'
g: B $-> B'
h: C $-> C'
i: D $-> D'
j: E $-> E'
sq2: h $o bc $== bc' $o g
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact cd de
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact bc' cd'
Epic0: Epic g
Monic0: Monic j
Epic1: Epic i
P: A
c': elt P C'
c: elt P C
b': elt P B'
lb': bc' $o b' $== c' - h $o c
b: elt P B
lb: g $o b $== b'
Lift c' h


    (* We obtain the correct lift by adding together the incorrect lift and its correction. *)
    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
B, C, D, E, B', C', D', E': A
bc: B $-> C
cd: C $-> D
de: D $-> E
bc': B' $-> C'
cd': C' $-> D'
de': D' $-> E'
g: B $-> B'
h: C $-> C'
i: D $-> D'
j: E $-> E'
sq2: h $o bc $== bc' $o g
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact cd de
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact bc' cd'
Epic0: Epic g
Monic0: Monic j
Epic1: Epic i
P: A
c': elt P C'
c: elt P C
b': elt P B'
lb': bc' $o b' $== c' - h $o c
b: elt P B
lb: g $o b $== b'
h $o (c + bc $o b) $== c'

    (* It remains to show that this is indeed a lift of [c']. *)
    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A

cd: C $-> D
de: D $-> E

cd': C' $-> D'
de': D' $-> E'
g: B $-> B'
h: C $-> C'
i: D $-> D'
j: E $-> E'
sq2: h $o bc $== bc' $o g
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact cd de
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact bc' cd'
Epic0: Epic g
Monic0: Monic j
Epic1: Epic i

c': elt P C'
c: elt P C
b': elt P B'
lb': bc' $o b' $== c' - h $o c
b: elt P B
lb: g $o b $== b'
h $o c + h $o (bc $o b) $== c'

    apply mon_unit_l_0gpd.
  Defined.

  (** If, in addition to the common assumptions, the composite of [B $-> C] and [C $-> D] is zero and the map [C $-> C'] is mono, then the map [D $-> D'] is mono. *)
  
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
B, C, D, E, B', C', D', E': A
bc: B $-> C
cd: C $-> D
de: D $-> E
bc': B' $-> C'
cd': C' $-> D'
de': D' $-> E'
g: B $-> B'
h: C $-> C'
i: D $-> D'
j: E $-> E'
sq2: h $o bc $== bc' $o g
sq3: i $o cd $== cd' $o h
sq4: j $o de $== de' $o i
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact cd de
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact bc' cd'
Epic0: Epic g
Monic0: Monic j
complex_bcd: cd $o bc $== 0
Monic1: Monic h
Monic i

  
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
B, C, D, E, B', C', D', E': A
bc: B $-> C
cd: C $-> D
de: D $-> E
bc': B' $-> C'
cd': C' $-> D'
de': D' $-> E'
g: B $-> B'
h: C $-> C'
i: D $-> D'
j: E $-> E'
sq2: h $o bc $== bc' $o g
sq3: i $o cd $== cd' $o h
sq4: j $o de $== de' $o i
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact cd de
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact bc' cd'
Epic0: Epic g
Monic0: Monic j
complex_bcd: cd $o bc $== 0
Monic1: Monic h
Monic i

    (* To show that a map is mono, it suffices to show that an arbitrary generalized element [d : elt P D] that goes to [0 : elt P D'] is homotopic to [0 : elt P D]. *)
    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
B, C, D, E, B', C', D', E': A

cd: C $-> D
de: D $-> E
bc': B' $-> C'
cd': C' $-> D'
de': D' $-> E'
g: B $-> B'
h: C $-> C'
i: D $-> D'
j: E $-> E'
sq2: h $o bc $== bc' $o g
sq3: i $o cd $== cd' $o h
sq4: j $o de $== de' $o i
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact cd de
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact bc' cd'
Epic0: Epic g
Monic0: Monic j
complex_bcd: cd $o bc $== 0
Monic1: Monic h
P: A
d: elt P D
p: i $o d $== 0
d $== 0


    (* Using exactness, we lift the element [d] to [c : elt _ C]. *)

    (* Since [h] is monic, it follows that [b] is a lift of [c]. *)

H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
B, C, D, E, B', C', D', E': A
bc: B $-> C
cd: C $-> D
de: D $-> E
bc': B' $-> C'
cd': C' $-> D'
de': D' $-> E'
g: B $-> B'
h: C $-> C'
i: D $-> D'
j: E $-> E'
sq2: h $o bc $== bc' $o g
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact cd de
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact bc' cd'
Epic0: Epic g
Monic0: Monic j
complex_bcd: cd $o bc $== 0
Monic1: Monic h
P: A
d: elt P D
c: elt P C
lc: cd $o c $== d
b': elt P B'
lb': bc' $o b' $== h $o c
b: elt P B
lb: g $o b $== b'
p': bc $o b $== c
d $== 0

H0: IsAbEpiStable A

de: D $-> E

j: E $-> E'

      exact lb'. 
A: Type

H0: IsAbEpiStable A
B, C, D, E, B', C', D', E': A

    (* So [d] lifts all the way to [B].  Since [B -> C -> D] is a complex, [d] is zero. *)
    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A

A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A

H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
B, C, D, E, B', C', D', E': A
bc: B $-> C
cd: C $-> D
de: D $-> E
bc': B' $-> C'
cd': C' $-> D'
de': D' $-> E'
g: B $-> B'
h: C $-> C'

CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact cd de
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact bc' cd'
Epic0: Epic g
Monic0: Monic j

Monic1: Monic h
P: A
d: elt P D
c: elt P C
lc: cd $o c $== d
b': elt P B'
lb': bc' $o b' $== h $o c
b: elt P B
lb: g $o b $== b'
p': bc $o b $== c
0 $o b $== 0

    apply precomp_zero.
  Defined.

End FourLemma.

(** ** The 3x3-lemmas as presented in Mac Lane's book "Homology" *)

Section ThreeByThree.

  Context {A : Type} `{Is1Cat A}.

  Context {X00 X01 X02 X10 X11 X12 X20 X21 X22 : A}
    (f0i : X00 $-> X01) (f0j : X01 $-> X02)
    (fi0 : X00 $-> X10) (fi1 : X01 $-> X11) (fi2 : X02 $-> X12)
    (f1i : X10 $-> X11) (f1j : X11 $-> X12)
    (fj0 : X10 $-> X20) (fj1 : X11 $-> X21) (fj2 : X12 $-> X22)
    (f2i : X20 $-> X21) (f2j : X21 $-> X22)
    (sq1 : fi1 $o f0i $== f1i $o fi0) (sq2 : fi2 $o f0j $== f1j $o fi1)
    (sq3 : fj1 $o f1i $== f2i $o fj0) (sq4 : fj2 $o f1j $== f2j $o fj1).

  (** The diagram has the following shape:
<<
  X00 ----f0i----> X01 ----f0j----> X02
   |                |                |
   |                |                |
  fi0     sq1      fi1     sq2      fi2
   |                |                |
   |                |                |
   v                v                v
  X10 ----f1i----> X11 ----f1j----> X12
   |                |                |
   |                |                |
  fj0     sq3      fj1     sq4      fj2
   |                |                |
   |                |                |
   v                v                v
  X20 ----f2i----> X21 ----f2j----> X22
>>
  *)

  (** If all three columns and the last two rows are short exact, then the top row is short exact.  We prove the three parts of the conclusion as separate results, each requiring a different subset of the hypotheses (and in fact not all of the hypotheses are needed). *)

  
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq1: fi1 $o f0i $== f1i $o fi0
sq2: fi2 $o f0j $== f1j $o fi1
sq3: fj1 $o f1i $== f2i $o fj0
sq4: fj2 $o f1j $== f2j $o fj1
Monic0: Monic f1i
Monic1: Monic fi0
Monic2: Monic fi1
Monic f0i

  
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq1: fi1 $o f0i $== f1i $o fi0
sq2: fi2 $o f0j $== f1j $o fi1
sq3: fj1 $o f1i $== f2i $o fj0
sq4: fj2 $o f1j $== f2j $o fj1
Monic0: Monic f1i
Monic1: Monic fi0
Monic2: Monic fi1
Monic f0i

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq1: fi1 $o f0i $== f1i $o fi0
sq2: fi2 $o f0j $== f1j $o fi1
sq3: fj1 $o f1i $== f2i $o fj0
sq4: fj2 $o f1j $== f2j $o fj1
Monic0: Monic f1i
Monic1: Monic fi0
Monic2: Monic fi1
Monic (fi1 $o f0i)

    exact (monic_homotopic _ _ sq1^$).
  Defined.

  (** For the remaining results, we need this assumption. *)
  Context `{!IsAbEpiStable A}.

  (** The hypotheses aren't entirely minimal here.  Instead of the two exactness hypotheses, we really only need that the lifting property holds. *)
  
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq1: fi1 $o f0i $== f1i $o fi0
sq2: fi2 $o f0j $== f1j $o fi1
sq3: fj1 $o f1i $== f2i $o fj0
sq4: fj2 $o f1j $== f2j $o fj1
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable A
Monic0: Monic f2i
Monic1: Monic fi1
Monic2: Monic fi2
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact fi0 fj0
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact f1i f1j
q: fj1 $o fi1 $== 0
CatIsAbExact f0i f0j

  
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq1: fi1 $o f0i $== f1i $o fi0
sq2: fi2 $o f0j $== f1j $o fi1
sq3: fj1 $o f1i $== f2i $o fj0
sq4: fj2 $o f1j $== f2j $o fj1
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable A
Monic0: Monic f2i
Monic1: Monic fi1
Monic2: Monic fi2
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact fi0 fj0
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact f1i f1j
q: fj1 $o fi1 $== 0
CatIsAbExact f0i f0j

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq1: fi1 $o f0i $== f1i $o fi0
sq2: fi2 $o f0j $== f1j $o fi1
sq3: fj1 $o f1i $== f2i $o fj0
sq4: fj2 $o f1j $== f2j $o fj1
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable A
Monic0: Monic f2i
Monic1: Monic fi1
Monic2: Monic fi2
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact fi0 fj0
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact f1i f1j
q: fj1 $o fi1 $== 0
f0j $o f0i $== 0
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq1: fi1 $o f0i $== f1i $o fi0
sq2: fi2 $o f0j $== f1j $o fi1
sq3: fj1 $o f1i $== f2i $o fj0
sq4: fj2 $o f1j $== f2j $o fj1
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable A
Monic0: Monic f2i
Monic1: Monic fi1
Monic2: Monic fi2
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact fi0 fj0
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact f1i f1j
q: fj1 $o fi1 $== 0
forall (P : A) (b : elt P X01), f0j $o b $== 0 -> Lift b f0i

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq1: fi1 $o f0i $== f1i $o fi0
sq2: fi2 $o f0j $== f1j $o fi1
sq3: fj1 $o f1i $== f2i $o fj0
sq4: fj2 $o f1j $== f2j $o fj1
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable A
Monic0: Monic f2i
Monic1: Monic fi1
Monic2: Monic fi2
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact fi0 fj0
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact f1i f1j
q: fj1 $o fi1 $== 0
f0j $o f0i $== 0
 
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq1: fi1 $o f0i $== f1i $o fi0
sq2: fi2 $o f0j $== f1j $o fi1
sq3: fj1 $o f1i $== f2i $o fj0
sq4: fj2 $o f1j $== f2j $o fj1
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable A
Monic0: Monic f2i
Monic1: Monic fi1
Monic2: Monic fi2
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact fi0 fj0
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact f1i f1j
q: fj1 $o fi1 $== 0
fi2 $o (f0j $o f0i) $== 0

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq1: fi1 $o f0i $== f1i $o fi0
sq2: fi2 $o f0j $== f1j $o fi1
sq3: fj1 $o f1i $== f2i $o fj0
sq4: fj2 $o f1j $== f2j $o fj1
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable A
Monic0: Monic f2i

Monic2: Monic fi2

CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact f1i f1j
q: fj1 $o fi1 $== 0
f1j $o (fi1 $o f0i) $== 0

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq1: fi1 $o f0i $== f1i $o fi0
sq2: fi2 $o f0j $== f1j $o fi1
sq3: fj1 $o f1i $== f2i $o fj0
sq4: fj2 $o f1j $== f2j $o fj1
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable A
Monic0: Monic f2i
Monic1: Monic fi1
Monic2: Monic fi2
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact fi0 fj0
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact f1i f1j
q: fj1 $o fi1 $== 0
f1j $o (f1i $o fi0) $== 0

f0j: X01 $-> X02

fi2: X02 $-> X12

f1j: X11 $-> X12

fj2: X12 $-> X22

f2j: X21 $-> X22

0 $o fi0 $== 0

A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq1: fi1 $o f0i $== f1i $o fi0
sq2: fi2 $o f0j $== f1j $o fi1
sq3: fj1 $o f1i $== f2i $o fj0
sq4: fj2 $o f1j $== f2j $o fj1

Monic0: Monic f2i
Monic1: Monic fi1
Monic2: Monic fi2
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact fi0 fj0
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact f1i f1j
q: fj1 $o fi1 $== 0
forall (P : A) (b : elt P X01), f0j $o b $== 0 -> Lift b f0i

H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12

x01: elt P X01

x00: elt P X00
lx00: fi0 $o x00 $== x10
Lift x01 f0i

f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq1: fi1 $o f0i $== f1i $o fi0
sq3: fj1 $o f1i $== f2i $o fj0
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable A
Monic0: Monic f2i
Monic1: Monic fi1
Monic2: Monic fi2
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact fi0 fj0
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact f1i f1j
q: fj1 $o fi1 $== 0
P: A
x10: elt P X10
x01: elt P X01
lx10: f1i $o x10 $== fi1 $o x01
0 $o x01 $== 0

        apply precomp_zero. 
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq1: fi1 $o f0i $== f1i $o fi0
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable A
Monic0: Monic f2i
Monic1: Monic fi1
Monic2: Monic fi2
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact fi0 fj0
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact f1i f1j
P: A
x01: elt P X01
x10: elt P X10
lx10: f1i $o x10 $== fi1 $o x01
x00: elt P X00
lx00: fi0 $o x00 $== x10
Lift x01 f0i

f0j: X01 $-> X02

f2j: X21 $-> X22

H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02

fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12

fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22

Monic1: Monic fi1
Monic2: Monic fi2

CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact f1i f1j

lx10: f1i $o x10 $== fi1 $o x01

fi1 $o (f0i $o x00) $== fi1 $o x01

f0j: X01 $-> X02

f1j: X11 $-> X12

fj2: X12 $-> X22

f2j: X21 $-> X22

A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq1: fi1 $o f0i $== f1i $o fi0
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable A
Monic0: Monic f2i
Monic1: Monic fi1
Monic2: Monic fi2
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact fi0 fj0
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact f1i f1j
P: A
x01: elt P X01
x10: elt P X10
lx10: f1i $o x10 $== fi1 $o x01
x00: elt P X00
lx00: fi0 $o x00 $== x10
f1i $o (fi0 $o x00) $== f1i $o x10

      exact (_ $@L lx00).
  Defined.

  (** We could also do away with some hypothesis here. *)
  
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq1: fi1 $o f0i $== f1i $o fi0
sq2: fi2 $o f0j $== f1j $o fi1
sq3: fj1 $o f1i $== f2i $o fj0
sq4: fj2 $o f1j $== f2j $o fj1
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable A
Monic0: Monic fi2
Epic0: Epic f1j
Epic1: Epic fj0
complex_f_2: fj2 $o fi2 $== 0
complex_f1_: f1j $o f1i $== 0
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact fi1 fj1
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact f2i f2j
Epic f0j

sq2: fi2 $o f0j $== f1j $o fi1
sq3: fj1 $o f1i $== f2i $o fj0
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable A
Monic0: Monic fi2
Epic0: Epic f1j
Epic1: Epic fj0
complex_f1_: f1j $o f1i $== 0
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact fi1 fj1
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact f2i f2j
P: A
x02: elt P X02
x11: elt P X11
lx11: f1j $o x11 $== fi2 $o x02
x20: elt P X20
lx20: f2i $o x20 $== fj1 $o x11
Lift x02 f0j

    exact lx11.
  Defined.

  (** If every column is exact, the top and bottom rows are short exact, and the middle row is a complex, then the middle row is short exact.  Like above, we prove the three parts of this separately, with fewer hypotheses. *)

  
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq1: fi1 $o f0i $== f1i $o fi0
sq2: fi2 $o f0j $== f1j $o fi1
sq3: fj1 $o f1i $== f2i $o fj0
sq4: fj2 $o f1j $== f2j $o fj1
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable A
Monic0: Monic f0i
Monic1: Monic f2i
Monic2: Monic fi1
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact fi0 fj0
Monic f1i

f0j: X01 $-> X02

sq4: fj2 $o f1j $== f2j $o fj1

f0j: X01 $-> X02

fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq1: fi1 $o f0i $== f1i $o fi0
sq2: fi2 $o f0j $== f1j $o fi1
sq3: fj1 $o f1i $== f2i $o fj0
sq4: fj2 $o f1j $== f2j $o fj1
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable A
cpx: f1j $o f1i $== 0
Epic0: Epic fj0
Monic0: Monic fi2
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f0i f0j
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact f2i f2j
CatIsAbExact2: CatIsAbExact fi1 fj1
P: A
x11: elt P X11
p: f1j $o x11 $== 0
Lift x11 f1i

IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02

fj2: X12 $-> X22

f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq1: fi1 $o f0i $== f1i $o fi0
sq2: fi2 $o f0j $== f1j $o fi1
sq3: fj1 $o f1i $== f2i $o fj0
sq4: fj2 $o f1j $== f2j $o fj1

cpx: f1j $o f1i $== 0

f2j $o (fj1 $o x11) $== 0
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A

f0j: X01 $-> X02

f2j: X21 $-> X22

lx20: f2i $o x20 $== fj1 $o x11

A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22

sq2: fi2 $o f0j $== f1j $o fi1
sq3: fj1 $o f1i $== f2i $o fj0
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable A
cpx: f1j $o f1i $== 0
Epic0: Epic fj0
Monic0: Monic fi2
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f0i f0j
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact f2i f2j
CatIsAbExact2: CatIsAbExact fi1 fj1
P: A
x11: elt P X11

x20: elt P X20
lx20: f2i $o x20 $== fj1 $o x11
Lift x11 f1i


    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10

fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12

f2j: X21 $-> X22

sq3: fj1 $o f1i $== f2i $o fj0

A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq1: fi1 $o f0i $== f1i $o fi0
sq2: fi2 $o f0j $== f1j $o fi1
sq3: fj1 $o f1i $== f2i $o fj0
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable A
cpx: f1j $o f1i $== 0
Epic0: Epic fj0
Monic0: Monic fi2
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f0i f0j
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact f2i f2j
CatIsAbExact2: CatIsAbExact fi1 fj1
P: A
x11: elt P X11
p: f1j $o x11 $== 0
x20: elt P X20
lx20: f2i $o x20 $== fj1 $o x11
x10: elt P X10
lx10: fj0 $o x10 $== x20
fj1 $o (x11 - f1i $o x10) $== 0
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq1: fi1 $o f0i $== f1i $o fi0
sq2: fi2 $o f0j $== f1j $o fi1

cpx: f1j $o f1i $== 0
Epic0: Epic fj0
Monic0: Monic fi2
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f0i f0j
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact f2i f2j
CatIsAbExact2: CatIsAbExact fi1 fj1
P: A
x11: elt P X11
p: f1j $o x11 $== 0
x01: elt P X01
x10: elt P X10
lx01: fi1 $o x01 $== x11 - f1i $o x10
Lift x11 f1i

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq1: fi1 $o f0i $== f1i $o fi0
sq2: fi2 $o f0j $== f1j $o fi1
sq3: fj1 $o f1i $== f2i $o fj0

cpx: f1j $o f1i $== 0
Epic0: Epic fj0
Monic0: Monic fi2
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f0i f0j
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact f2i f2j
CatIsAbExact2: CatIsAbExact fi1 fj1

x11: elt P X11
p: f1j $o x11 $== 0

lx20: f2i $o x20 $== fj1 $o x11
x10: elt P X10
lx10: fj0 $o x10 $== x20
fj1 $o (x11 - f1i $o x10) $== 0
 
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq1: fi1 $o f0i $== f1i $o fi0
sq2: fi2 $o f0j $== f1j $o fi1
sq3: fj1 $o f1i $== f2i $o fj0
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable A
cpx: f1j $o f1i $== 0
Epic0: Epic fj0
Monic0: Monic fi2
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f0i f0j
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact f2i f2j
CatIsAbExact2: CatIsAbExact fi1 fj1
P: A
x11: elt P X11
p: f1j $o x11 $== 0
x20: elt P X20
lx20: f2i $o x20 $== fj1 $o x11
x10: elt P X10
lx10: fj0 $o x10 $== x20
fj1 $o x11 - fj1 $o (f1i $o x10) $== 0

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq1: fi1 $o f0i $== f1i $o fi0
sq2: fi2 $o f0j $== f1j $o fi1
sq3: fj1 $o f1i $== f2i $o fj0
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable A
cpx: f1j $o f1i $== 0
Epic0: Epic fj0
Monic0: Monic fi2
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f0i f0j
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact f2i f2j
CatIsAbExact2: CatIsAbExact fi1 fj1
P: A
x11: elt P X11
p: f1j $o x11 $== 0
x20: elt P X20
lx20: f2i $o x20 $== fj1 $o x11
x10: elt P X10
lx10: fj0 $o x10 $== x20
fj1 $o x11 $== fj1 $o (f1i $o x10)

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq1: fi1 $o f0i $== f1i $o fi0
sq2: fi2 $o f0j $== f1j $o fi1
sq3: fj1 $o f1i $== f2i $o fj0
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable A
cpx: f1j $o f1i $== 0
Epic0: Epic fj0
Monic0: Monic fi2
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f0i f0j
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact f2i f2j
CatIsAbExact2: CatIsAbExact fi1 fj1
P: A
x11: elt P X11
p: f1j $o x11 $== 0
x20: elt P X20
lx20: f2i $o x20 $== fj1 $o x11
x10: elt P X10
lx10: fj0 $o x10 $== x20
fj1 $o x11 $== f2i $o (fj0 $o x10)

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq1: fi1 $o f0i $== f1i $o fi0
sq2: fi2 $o f0j $== f1j $o fi1
sq3: fj1 $o f1i $== f2i $o fj0
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable A
cpx: f1j $o f1i $== 0
Epic0: Epic fj0
Monic0: Monic fi2
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f0i f0j
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact f2i f2j
CatIsAbExact2: CatIsAbExact fi1 fj1
P: A
x11: elt P X11
p: f1j $o x11 $== 0
x20: elt P X20
lx20: f2i $o x20 $== fj1 $o x11
x10: elt P X10
lx10: fj0 $o x10 $== x20
fj1 $o x11 $== f2i $o x20

      exact lx20^$. 
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq1: fi1 $o f0i $== f1i $o fi0
sq2: fi2 $o f0j $== f1j $o fi1
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable A
cpx: f1j $o f1i $== 0
Epic0: Epic fj0
Monic0: Monic fi2
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f0i f0j
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact f2i f2j
CatIsAbExact2: CatIsAbExact fi1 fj1
P: A
x11: elt P X11
p: f1j $o x11 $== 0
x01: elt P X01
x10: elt P X10
lx01: fi1 $o x01 $== x11 - f1i $o x10
Lift x11 f1i

fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq1: fi1 $o f0i $== f1i $o fi0
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable A
Epic0: Epic fj0
Monic0: Monic fi2
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f0i f0j
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact f2i f2j
CatIsAbExact2: CatIsAbExact fi1 fj1
P: A
x10: elt P X10
x01: elt P X01
x11: elt P X11
lx01: fi1 $o x01 $== x11 - f1i $o x10
x00: elt P X00
lx00: f0i $o x00 $== x01
Lift x11 f1i

H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12

fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq1: fi1 $o f0i $== f1i $o fi0
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable A
Epic0: Epic fj0
Monic0: Monic fi2
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f0i f0j

lx00: f0i $o x00 $== x01

H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12

fj1: X11 $-> X21

f2j: X21 $-> X22

lx00: f0i $o x00 $== x01
f1i $o (fi0 $o x00 + x10) $== x11

    napply mon_unit_r_0gpd.
  Defined.

f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq1: fi1 $o f0i $== f1i $o fi0
sq2: fi2 $o f0j $== f1j $o fi1
sq3: fj1 $o f1i $== f2i $o fj0
sq4: fj2 $o f1j $== f2j $o fj1
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable A
Epic0: Epic f0j
Epic1: Epic f2j
Epic2: Epic fj1
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact fi2 fj2
Epic f1j

H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq1: fi1 $o f0i $== f1i $o fi0
sq2: fi2 $o f0j $== f1j $o fi1
sq3: fj1 $o f1i $== f2i $o fj0
sq4: fj2 $o f1j $== f2j $o fj1
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable A
Epic0: Epic f0j
Epic1: Epic f2j
Epic2: Epic fj1
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact fi2 fj2
Epic f1j

f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22

A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq2: fi2 $o f0j $== f1j $o fi1
sq4: fj2 $o f1j $== f2j $o fj1
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable A
Epic0: Epic f0j
Epic1: Epic f2j
Epic2: Epic fj1
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact fi2 fj2

x12: elt P X12
lx11: f2j $o fj1 $o x11 $== fj2 $o x12
Lift x12 f1j


    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq2: fi2 $o f0j $== f1j $o fi1
sq4: fj2 $o f1j $== f2j $o fj1
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable A
Epic0: Epic f0j
Epic1: Epic f2j
Epic2: Epic fj1
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact fi2 fj2
P: A
x11: elt P X11
x12: elt P X12
lx11: f2j $o fj1 $o x11 $== fj2 $o x12
fj2 $o (x12 - f1j $o x11) $== 0

IsGraph0: IsGraph A

x11: elt P X11
lx02: fi2 $o x02 $== x12 - f1j $o x11
Lift x12 f1j

f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02

f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22

f2j: X21 $-> X22

A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq2: fi2 $o f0j $== f1j $o fi1
sq4: fj2 $o f1j $== f2j $o fj1
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable A
Epic0: Epic f0j
Epic1: Epic f2j
Epic2: Epic fj1
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact fi2 fj2

x12: elt P X12
lx11: f2j $o fj1 $o x11 $== fj2 $o x12
fj2 $o x12 - fj2 $o (f1j $o x11) $== 0

IsGraph0: IsGraph A

H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02

f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22

f2j: X21 $-> X22

fj2 $o x12 $== fj2 $o (f1j $o x11)

A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22

f2j: X21 $-> X22

X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02

fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12

fj1: X11 $-> X21

Epic2: Epic fj1

A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22

f2j: X21 $-> X22

Epic0: Epic f0j
Epic1: Epic f2j
Epic2: Epic fj1

x11: elt P X11
x12: elt P X12
x02: elt P X02
lx02: fi2 $o x02 $== x12 - f1j $o x11
x01: elt P X01
lx01: f0j $o x01 $== x02
f1j $o (fi1 $o x01 + x11) $== x12

IsGraph0: IsGraph A

f1j $o (fi1 $o x01) + f1j $o x11 $== x12

IsGraph0: IsGraph A

Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A

f0j: X01 $-> X02

A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12

fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22

f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq2: fi2 $o f0j $== f1j $o fi1
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable A
Epic0: Epic f0j
Epic1: Epic f2j
Epic2: Epic fj1
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact fi2 fj2
P: A
x11: elt P X11
x12: elt P X12
x02: elt P X02
lx02: fi2 $o x02 $== x12 - f1j $o x11
x01: elt P X01
lx01: f0j $o x01 $== x02
x12 + (- (f1j $o x11) + f1j $o x11) $== x12

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
X00, X01, X02, X10, X11, X12, X20, X21, X22: A
f0i: X00 $-> X01
f0j: X01 $-> X02
fi0: X00 $-> X10
fi1: X01 $-> X11
fi2: X02 $-> X12
f1i: X10 $-> X11
f1j: X11 $-> X12
fj0: X10 $-> X20
fj1: X11 $-> X21
fj2: X12 $-> X22
f2i: X20 $-> X21
f2j: X21 $-> X22
sq2: fi2 $o f0j $== f1j $o fi1
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable A
Epic0: Epic f0j
Epic1: Epic f2j
Epic2: Epic fj1
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact fi2 fj2
P: A
x11: elt P X11
x12: elt P X12
x02: elt P X02
lx02: fi2 $o x02 $== x12 - f1j $o x11
x01: elt P X01
lx01: f0j $o x01 $== x02
x12 + 0 $== x12

    apply mon_unit_r_0gpd.
  Defined.

End ThreeByThree.

(** ** The spider lemma *)

Section Spider.

  Context {A : Type} `{IsAbEpiStable A}.

  (** Given a diagram
<<
    A1 -> A2
      \   ^
       v /
        X
       ^ \
      /   v
    B1 -> B2
>>
  where the diagonals are exact, if the map [B1 $-> B2] is mono/epi, so is the map [A1 $-> A2]. *)

  Context {A1 A2 X B1 B2 : A} (a : A1 $-> A2) (ax : A1 $-> X)
    (xa : X $-> A2) (b : B1 $-> B2) (bx : B1 $-> X) (xb : X $-> B2)
    {tr1 : xa $o ax $== a} {tr2 : xb $o bx $== b}
    `{!Monic ax} `{!CatIsAbExact ax xb} `{!Epic xb}
    `{!Monic bx} `{!CatIsAbExact bx xa} `{!Epic xa}.

  
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
A1, A2, X, B1, B2: A
a: A1 $-> A2
ax: A1 $-> X
xa: X $-> A2
b: B1 $-> B2
bx: B1 $-> X
xb: X $-> B2
tr1: xa $o ax $== a
tr2: xb $o bx $== b
Monic0: Monic ax
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact ax xb
Epic0: Epic xb
Monic1: Monic bx
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact bx xa
Epic1: Epic xa
Monic2: Monic b
Monic a

Epic0: Epic xb

      apply precomp_zero.

CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact ax xb
Epic0: Epic xb
Monic1: Monic bx
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact bx xa
Epic1: Epic xa
Epic2: Epic b

a2: elt P A2
lx: xa $o x $== a2

A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
A1, A2, X, B1, B2: A
a: A1 $-> A2
ax: A1 $-> X
xa: X $-> A2
b: B1 $-> B2
bx: B1 $-> X
xb: X $-> B2
tr1: xa $o ax $== a
tr2: xb $o bx $== b
Monic0: Monic ax
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact ax xb
Epic0: Epic xb
Monic1: Monic bx
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact bx xa
Epic1: Epic xa
Epic2: Epic b
P: A
a2: elt P A2
x: elt P X
lx: xa $o x $== a2
b1: elt P B1
lb1: b $o b1 $== xb $o x
Lift a2 a


    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
A1, A2, X, B1, B2: A
a: A1 $-> A2
ax: A1 $-> X
xa: X $-> A2
b: B1 $-> B2
bx: B1 $-> X
xb: X $-> B2
tr1: xa $o ax $== a
tr2: xb $o bx $== b
Monic0: Monic ax
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact ax xb
Epic0: Epic xb
Monic1: Monic bx
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact bx xa
Epic1: Epic xa
Epic2: Epic b
P: A
a2: elt P A2
x: elt P X
lx: xa $o x $== a2
b1: elt P B1
lb1: b $o b1 $== xb $o x
xb $o (x - bx $o b1) $== 0
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
A1, A2, X, B1, B2: A
a: A1 $-> A2
ax: A1 $-> X
xa: X $-> A2
b: B1 $-> B2
bx: B1 $-> X
xb: X $-> B2
tr1: xa $o ax $== a
Monic0: Monic ax
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact ax xb
Epic0: Epic xb
Monic1: Monic bx
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact bx xa
Epic1: Epic xa
Epic2: Epic b
P: A
x: elt P X
a2: elt P A2
lx: xa $o x $== a2
a1: elt P A1
b1: elt P B1
la1: ax $o a1 $== x - bx $o b1
Lift a2 a

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
A1, A2, X, B1, B2: A
a: A1 $-> A2
ax: A1 $-> X
xa: X $-> A2
b: B1 $-> B2
bx: B1 $-> X
xb: X $-> B2
tr1: xa $o ax $== a
tr2: xb $o bx $== b
Monic0: Monic ax
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact ax xb
Epic0: Epic xb
Monic1: Monic bx
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact bx xa
Epic1: Epic xa
Epic2: Epic b
P: A
a2: elt P A2
x: elt P X
lx: xa $o x $== a2
b1: elt P B1
lb1: b $o b1 $== xb $o x
xb $o (x - bx $o b1) $== 0

IsGraph0: IsGraph A

H: Is1Cat A

a: A1 $-> A2
ax: A1 $-> X
xa: X $-> A2
b: B1 $-> B2
bx: B1 $-> X
xb: X $-> B2
tr1: xa $o ax $== a
tr2: xb $o bx $== b
Monic0: Monic ax
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact ax xb
Epic0: Epic xb
Monic1: Monic bx
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact bx xa
Epic1: Epic xa
Epic2: Epic b
P: A
a2: elt P A2
x: elt P X
lx: xa $o x $== a2
b1: elt P B1
lb1: b $o b1 $== xb $o x
xb $o x - xb $o (bx $o b1) $== 0

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
A1, A2, X, B1, B2: A
a: A1 $-> A2
ax: A1 $-> X
xa: X $-> A2
b: B1 $-> B2
bx: B1 $-> X
xb: X $-> B2
tr1: xa $o ax $== a
tr2: xb $o bx $== b
Monic0: Monic ax
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact ax xb
Epic0: Epic xb
Monic1: Monic bx
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact bx xa
Epic1: Epic xa
Epic2: Epic b
P: A
a2: elt P A2
x: elt P X
lx: xa $o x $== a2
b1: elt P B1
lb1: b $o b1 $== xb $o x
xb $o x - b $o b1 $== 0

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A

Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
A1, A2, X, B1, B2: A
a: A1 $-> A2
ax: A1 $-> X
xa: X $-> A2
b: B1 $-> B2
bx: B1 $-> X
xb: X $-> B2

tr2: xb $o bx $== b

b1: elt P B1
lb1: b $o b1 $== xb $o x
b $o b1 - b $o b1 $== 0

      apply inverse_r_0gpd. 
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
A1, A2, X, B1, B2: A
a: A1 $-> A2
ax: A1 $-> X
xa: X $-> A2
b: B1 $-> B2
bx: B1 $-> X
xb: X $-> B2
tr1: xa $o ax $== a
Monic0: Monic ax
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact ax xb
Epic0: Epic xb
Monic1: Monic bx
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact bx xa
Epic1: Epic xa
Epic2: Epic b

x: elt P X
a2: elt P A2
lx: xa $o x $== a2
a1: elt P A1
b1: elt P B1
la1: ax $o a1 $== x - bx $o b1
Lift a2 a

Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
A1, A2, X, B1, B2: A

xa $o (ax $o a1) $== a2

b: B1 $-> B2

xa $o (x - bx $o b1) $== a2

IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A

H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A

xa: X $-> A2
b: B1 $-> B2
bx: B1 $-> X
xb: X $-> B2

xa $o x - xa $o (bx $o b1) $== a2

H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A

b: B1 $-> B2

xa $o x - 0 $o b1 $== a2

xa $o x $== a2

    exact lx.
  Defined.

End Spider.

(** ** The incomplete snail lemma *)

Section Snail.

  Context {A : Type} `{IsAbEpiStable A}.

  (** Here we will prove the incomplete snail lemma.  The complete snail lemma was developed as a more general analogue of the snake lemma that holds in certain non-abelian contexts.  The incomplete snail lemma is a lemma that one can use to prove the complete snail lemma.  In fact, if the incomplete snail lemma is true and if every kernel map in the category has a cokernel, then the complete snail lemma is true.  See Janelidze, Vitale; The snail lemma in a pointed regular category. *)

  Context {W1 W2 X Y1 Y2 Z : A} (w : W1 $-> W2) (wx : W1 $-> X)
    (wz : W2 $-> Z) (xw : X $-> W2) (xy : X $-> Y2)
    (y : Y1 $-> Y2) (yx : Y1 $-> X) (yz : Y2 $-> Z)
    (tr1 :  w $== xw $o wx) (tr2 : y $== xy $o yx)
    (sq1 : wz $o xw $== yz $o xy).

  (** We assume that we have a diagram of shape:
<<
        W1 = = W1
        |      |
        |      |
        v      v
  Y1 -> X ---> W2 ---> 0
  ||    |      |
  ||    |      |
  ||    v      v
  Y1 -> Y2 --> Z
>>
  Each row and the first column is assumed to be exact.  We will show that the last column is exact as well. *)

  
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
W1, W2, X, Y1, Y2, Z: A
w: W1 $-> W2
wx: W1 $-> X
wz: W2 $-> Z
xw: X $-> W2
xy: X $-> Y2
y: Y1 $-> Y2
yx: Y1 $-> X
yz: Y2 $-> Z
tr1: w $== xw $o wx
tr2: y $== xy $o yx
sq1: wz $o xw $== yz $o xy
Epic0: Epic xw
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact wx xy
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact yx xw
CatIsAbExact2: CatIsAbExact y yz
CatIsAbExact w wz

  
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
W1, W2, X, Y1, Y2, Z: A
w: W1 $-> W2
wx: W1 $-> X
wz: W2 $-> Z
xw: X $-> W2
xy: X $-> Y2
y: Y1 $-> Y2
yx: Y1 $-> X
yz: Y2 $-> Z
tr1: w $== xw $o wx
tr2: y $== xy $o yx
sq1: wz $o xw $== yz $o xy
Epic0: Epic xw
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact wx xy
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact yx xw
CatIsAbExact2: CatIsAbExact y yz
CatIsAbExact w wz

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
W1, W2, X, Y1, Y2, Z: A
w: W1 $-> W2
wx: W1 $-> X
wz: W2 $-> Z
xw: X $-> W2
xy: X $-> Y2
y: Y1 $-> Y2
yx: Y1 $-> X
yz: Y2 $-> Z
tr1: w $== xw $o wx
tr2: y $== xy $o yx
sq1: wz $o xw $== yz $o xy
Epic0: Epic xw
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact wx xy
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact yx xw
CatIsAbExact2: CatIsAbExact y yz
wz $o w $== 0
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
W1, W2, X, Y1, Y2, Z: A
w: W1 $-> W2
wx: W1 $-> X
wz: W2 $-> Z
xw: X $-> W2
xy: X $-> Y2
y: Y1 $-> Y2
yx: Y1 $-> X
yz: Y2 $-> Z
tr1: w $== xw $o wx
tr2: y $== xy $o yx
sq1: wz $o xw $== yz $o xy
Epic0: Epic xw
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact wx xy
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact yx xw
CatIsAbExact2: CatIsAbExact y yz
forall (P : A) (b : elt P W2), wz $o b $== 0 -> Lift b w

IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A

w: W1 $-> W2
wx: W1 $-> X
wz: W2 $-> Z
xw: X $-> W2
xy: X $-> Y2
y: Y1 $-> Y2
yx: Y1 $-> X
yz: Y2 $-> Z
tr1: w $== xw $o wx
tr2: y $== xy $o yx
sq1: wz $o xw $== yz $o xy
Epic0: Epic xw
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact wx xy
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact yx xw
CatIsAbExact2: CatIsAbExact y yz
wz $o w $== 0

A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
W1, W2, X, Y1, Y2, Z: A
w: W1 $-> W2
wx: W1 $-> X
wz: W2 $-> Z
xw: X $-> W2
xy: X $-> Y2
y: Y1 $-> Y2
yx: Y1 $-> X
yz: Y2 $-> Z
tr1: w $== xw $o wx
tr2: y $== xy $o yx
sq1: wz $o xw $== yz $o xy
Epic0: Epic xw

CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact yx xw
CatIsAbExact2: CatIsAbExact y yz
yz $o 0 $== 0

      apply postcomp_zero.
    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
W1, W2, X, Y1, Y2, Z: A
w: W1 $-> W2
wx: W1 $-> X
wz: W2 $-> Z
xw: X $-> W2
xy: X $-> Y2
y: Y1 $-> Y2
yx: Y1 $-> X
yz: Y2 $-> Z
tr1: w $== xw $o wx
tr2: y $== xy $o yx
sq1: wz $o xw $== yz $o xy
Epic0: Epic xw
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact wx xy
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact yx xw
CatIsAbExact2: CatIsAbExact y yz
forall (P : A) (b : elt P W2), wz $o b $== 0 -> Lift b w
 
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A

w: W1 $-> W2
wx: W1 $-> X
wz: W2 $-> Z
xw: X $-> W2
xy: X $-> Y2
y: Y1 $-> Y2
yx: Y1 $-> X
yz: Y2 $-> Z
tr1: w $== xw $o wx
tr2: y $== xy $o yx
sq1: wz $o xw $== yz $o xy

CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact wx xy
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact yx xw
CatIsAbExact2: CatIsAbExact y yz
P: A
w2: elt P W2
p: wz $o w2 $== 0
Lift w2 w

yx: Y1 $-> X

CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact wx xy

CatIsAbExact2: CatIsAbExact y yz

p: wz $o w2 $== 0

lx: xw $o x $== w2

A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
W1, W2, X, Y1, Y2, Z: A
w: W1 $-> W2
wx: W1 $-> X
wz: W2 $-> Z

y: Y1 $-> Y2
yx: Y1 $-> X

yz $o (xy $o x) $== 0
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
W1, W2, X, Y1, Y2, Z: A
w: W1 $-> W2
wx: W1 $-> X
wz: W2 $-> Z
xw: X $-> W2
xy: X $-> Y2
y: Y1 $-> Y2
yx: Y1 $-> X
yz: Y2 $-> Z
tr1: w $== xw $o wx
tr2: y $== xy $o yx
Epic0: Epic xw
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact wx xy
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact yx xw
CatIsAbExact2: CatIsAbExact y yz
P: A
x: elt P X
w2: elt P W2
lx: xw $o x $== w2
y1: elt P Y1
ly1: y $o y1 $== xy $o x
Lift w2 w

IsGraph0: IsGraph A

H: Is1Cat A

wz: W2 $-> Z

y: Y1 $-> Y2

x: elt P X
lx: xw $o x $== w2
yz $o (xy $o x) $== 0
 
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
W1, W2, X, Y1, Y2, Z: A
w: W1 $-> W2
wx: W1 $-> X
wz: W2 $-> Z
xw: X $-> W2
xy: X $-> Y2
y: Y1 $-> Y2
yx: Y1 $-> X
yz: Y2 $-> Z
tr1: w $== xw $o wx
tr2: y $== xy $o yx
sq1: wz $o xw $== yz $o xy
Epic0: Epic xw
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact wx xy
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact yx xw
CatIsAbExact2: CatIsAbExact y yz
P: A
w2: elt P W2
p: wz $o w2 $== 0
x: elt P X
lx: xw $o x $== w2
wz $o (xw $o x) $== 0

wz $o w2 $== 0

        exact p.

        apply inverse_r_0gpd.

wz: W2 $-> Z

CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact yx xw

w2: elt P W2
x: elt P X
lx: xw $o x $== w2
w1: elt P W1
y1: elt P Y1
lw1: wx $o w1 $== x - yx $o y1
xw $o x $== w2

      exact lx.
  Defined.

End Snail.

(** ** Two-by-three lemmas *)

Section TwoByThree.

  Context {A : Type} `{IsAbEpiStable A}.

  (** Here we will show how to transport the structure of an exact sequence across a morphism of composable pairs satisfying some properties. *)

  Context {A1 A2 B1 B2 C1 C2 : A}
    (f1 : A1 $-> B1) (g1 : B1 $-> C1)
    (f2 : A2 $-> B2) (g2 : B2 $-> C2)
    (a : A1 $-> A2) (b : B1 $-> B2) (c : C1 $-> C2)
    (sq1 : b $o f1 $== f2 $o a) (sq2 : c $o g1 $== g2 $o b)
    `{!Epic a} `{!Monic c}.

  (** In general, the diagrams will be of the shape:
<<
  A1 ---> B1 ---> C1
  |        |       v
  |        |       |
  v        |       |
  v        v       v
  A2 ---> B2 ---> C2
>>
  In particular the map [A1 $-> A2] is epi and the map [C1 $-> C2] is mono. *)

  (** If the middle map [B1 $-> B2] is also epi and the upper morphisms [A1 $-> B1] and [B1 $-> C1] form an exact sequence, then the lower morphisms [A2 $-> B2] and [B2 $-> C2] form an exact sequence. *)
  
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
A1, A2, B1, B2, C1, C2: A
f1: A1 $-> B1
g1: B1 $-> C1
f2: A2 $-> B2
g2: B2 $-> C2
a: A1 $-> A2
b: B1 $-> B2
c: C1 $-> C2
sq1: b $o f1 $== f2 $o a
sq2: c $o g1 $== g2 $o b
Epic0: Epic a
Monic0: Monic c
Epic1: Epic b
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f1 g1
CatIsAbExact f2 g2

  
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
A1, A2, B1, B2, C1, C2: A
f1: A1 $-> B1
g1: B1 $-> C1
f2: A2 $-> B2
g2: B2 $-> C2
a: A1 $-> A2
b: B1 $-> B2
c: C1 $-> C2
sq1: b $o f1 $== f2 $o a
sq2: c $o g1 $== g2 $o b
Epic0: Epic a
Monic0: Monic c
Epic1: Epic b
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f1 g1
CatIsAbExact f2 g2

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
A1, A2, B1, B2, C1, C2: A
f1: A1 $-> B1
g1: B1 $-> C1
f2: A2 $-> B2
g2: B2 $-> C2
a: A1 $-> A2
b: B1 $-> B2
c: C1 $-> C2
sq1: b $o f1 $== f2 $o a
sq2: c $o g1 $== g2 $o b
Epic0: Epic a
Monic0: Monic c
Epic1: Epic b
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f1 g1
g2 $o f2 $== 0
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
A1, A2, B1, B2, C1, C2: A
f1: A1 $-> B1
g1: B1 $-> C1
f2: A2 $-> B2
g2: B2 $-> C2
a: A1 $-> A2
b: B1 $-> B2
c: C1 $-> C2
sq1: b $o f1 $== f2 $o a
sq2: c $o g1 $== g2 $o b
Epic0: Epic a
Monic0: Monic c
Epic1: Epic b
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f1 g1
forall (P : A) (b0 : elt P B2), g2 $o b0 $== 0 -> Lift b0 f2

    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
A1, A2, B1, B2, C1, C2: A
f1: A1 $-> B1
g1: B1 $-> C1
f2: A2 $-> B2
g2: B2 $-> C2
a: A1 $-> A2
b: B1 $-> B2
c: C1 $-> C2
sq1: b $o f1 $== f2 $o a
sq2: c $o g1 $== g2 $o b
Epic0: Epic a
Monic0: Monic c
Epic1: Epic b
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f1 g1
g2 $o f2 $== 0
 
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
A1, A2, B1, B2, C1, C2: A
f1: A1 $-> B1
g1: B1 $-> C1
f2: A2 $-> B2
g2: B2 $-> C2
a: A1 $-> A2
b: B1 $-> B2
c: C1 $-> C2
sq1: b $o f1 $== f2 $o a
sq2: c $o g1 $== g2 $o b
Epic0: Epic a
Monic0: Monic c
Epic1: Epic b
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f1 g1
g2 $o f2 $o a $== 0 $o a

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
A1, A2, B1, B2, C1, C2: A
f1: A1 $-> B1
g1: B1 $-> C1
f2: A2 $-> B2
g2: B2 $-> C2
a: A1 $-> A2
b: B1 $-> B2
c: C1 $-> C2
sq1: b $o f1 $== f2 $o a
sq2: c $o g1 $== g2 $o b
Epic0: Epic a
Monic0: Monic c
Epic1: Epic b
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f1 g1
g2 $o f2 $o a $== 0

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
A1, A2, B1, B2, C1, C2: A
f1: A1 $-> B1
g1: B1 $-> C1
f2: A2 $-> B2
g2: B2 $-> C2
a: A1 $-> A2
b: B1 $-> B2
c: C1 $-> C2
sq1: b $o f1 $== f2 $o a
sq2: c $o g1 $== g2 $o b
Epic0: Epic a
Monic0: Monic c
Epic1: Epic b
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f1 g1
g2 $o b $o f1 $== 0

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
A1, A2, B1, B2, C1, C2: A
f1: A1 $-> B1
g1: B1 $-> C1
f2: A2 $-> B2
g2: B2 $-> C2
a: A1 $-> A2
b: B1 $-> B2
c: C1 $-> C2
sq1: b $o f1 $== f2 $o a
sq2: c $o g1 $== g2 $o b
Epic0: Epic a
Monic0: Monic c
Epic1: Epic b
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f1 g1
c $o g1 $o f1 $== 0

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
A1, A2, B1, B2, C1, C2: A
f1: A1 $-> B1
g1: B1 $-> C1
f2: A2 $-> B2
g2: B2 $-> C2
a: A1 $-> A2
b: B1 $-> B2
c: C1 $-> C2
sq1: b $o f1 $== f2 $o a
sq2: c $o g1 $== g2 $o b
Epic0: Epic a
Monic0: Monic c
Epic1: Epic b
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f1 g1
c $o (g1 $o f1) $== 0

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
A1, A2, B1, B2, C1, C2: A
f1: A1 $-> B1
g1: B1 $-> C1
f2: A2 $-> B2
g2: B2 $-> C2
a: A1 $-> A2
b: B1 $-> B2
c: C1 $-> C2
sq1: b $o f1 $== f2 $o a
sq2: c $o g1 $== g2 $o b
Epic0: Epic a
Monic0: Monic c
Epic1: Epic b
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f1 g1
c $o 0 $== 0

      apply postcomp_zero.
    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
A1, A2, B1, B2, C1, C2: A
f1: A1 $-> B1
g1: B1 $-> C1
f2: A2 $-> B2
g2: B2 $-> C2
a: A1 $-> A2
b: B1 $-> B2
c: C1 $-> C2
sq1: b $o f1 $== f2 $o a
sq2: c $o g1 $== g2 $o b
Epic0: Epic a
Monic0: Monic c
Epic1: Epic b
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f1 g1
forall (P : A) (b0 : elt P B2), g2 $o b0 $== 0 -> Lift b0 f2

H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A

g1: B1 $-> C1
f2: A2 $-> B2
g2: B2 $-> C2
a: A1 $-> A2
b: B1 $-> B2
c: C1 $-> C2
sq1: b $o f1 $== f2 $o a
sq2: c $o g1 $== g2 $o b
Epic0: Epic a
Monic0: Monic c
Epic1: Epic b
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f1 g1
P: A
b2: elt P B2
p: g2 $o b2 $== 0
Lift b2 f2

g1: B1 $-> C1
f2: A2 $-> B2
g2: B2 $-> C2
a: A1 $-> A2
b: B1 $-> B2
c: C1 $-> C2
sq1: b $o f1 $== f2 $o a
sq2: c $o g1 $== g2 $o b
Epic0: Epic a
Monic0: Monic c
Epic1: Epic b
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f1 g1

Lift b2 f2

g1: B1 $-> C1

        by lhs' napply (_ $@L lb1).

H0: IsAbEpiStable A

g1: B1 $-> C1

b: B1 $-> B2
c: C1 $-> C2
sq1: b $o f1 $== f2 $o a
Epic0: Epic a
Monic0: Monic c
Epic1: Epic b
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f1 g1

b2: elt P B2
p: g2 $o b2 $== 0

A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
A1, A2, B1, B2, C1, C2: A
f1: A1 $-> B1
g1: B1 $-> C1
f2: A2 $-> B2
g2: B2 $-> C2
a: A1 $-> A2
b: B1 $-> B2
c: C1 $-> C2
sq1: b $o f1 $== f2 $o a
Epic0: Epic a
Monic0: Monic c
Epic1: Epic b
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f1 g1
P: A
b2: elt P B2
p: g2 $o b2 $== 0
b1: elt P B1
lb1: b $o b1 $== b2
a1: elt P A1
la1: f1 $o a1 $== b1
b $o (f1 $o a1) $== b2

      by lhs' napply (_ $@L la1).
  Defined.

  (** If the middle map [B1 $-> B2] is now mono and the lower morphisms [A2 $-> B2] and [B2 $-> C2] form an exact sequence, then the upper morphisms [A1 $-> B1] and [B1 $-> C1] form an exact sequence. *)
  
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
A1, A2, B1, B2, C1, C2: A
f1: A1 $-> B1
g1: B1 $-> C1
f2: A2 $-> B2
g2: B2 $-> C2
a: A1 $-> A2
b: B1 $-> B2
c: C1 $-> C2
sq1: b $o f1 $== f2 $o a
sq2: c $o g1 $== g2 $o b
Epic0: Epic a
Monic0: Monic c
Monic1: Monic b
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f2 g2
CatIsAbExact f1 g1

a: A1 $-> A2
b: B1 $-> B2

sq1: b $o f1 $== f2 $o a
sq2: c $o g1 $== g2 $o b
Epic0: Epic a

IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A

b: B1 $-> B2

H0: IsAbEpiStable A

g1: B1 $-> C1
f2: A2 $-> B2
g2: B2 $-> C2

b: B1 $-> B2
c: C1 $-> C2
sq1: b $o f1 $== f2 $o a
Epic0: Epic a
Monic0: Monic c
Monic1: Monic b
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f2 g2
P: A
a2: elt P A2

b: B1 $-> B2

sq2: c $o g1 $== g2 $o b
Epic0: Epic a
Monic0: Monic c

H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
A1, A2, B1, B2, C1, C2: A
f1: A1 $-> B1
g1: B1 $-> C1
f2: A2 $-> B2
g2: B2 $-> C2
a: A1 $-> A2
b: B1 $-> B2
c: C1 $-> C2
sq1: b $o f1 $== f2 $o a
sq2: c $o g1 $== g2 $o b
Epic0: Epic a
Monic0: Monic c
Monic1: Monic b
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f2 g2
P: A
b1: elt P B1
p: g1 $o b1 $== 0
c $o 0 $== 0

        apply postcomp_zero. 
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
A1, A2, B1, B2, C1, C2: A
f1: A1 $-> B1
g1: B1 $-> C1
f2: A2 $-> B2
g2: B2 $-> C2
a: A1 $-> A2
b: B1 $-> B2
c: C1 $-> C2
sq1: b $o f1 $== f2 $o a
Epic0: Epic a
Monic0: Monic c
Monic1: Monic b
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f2 g2
P: A
a2: elt P A2
b1: elt P B1
la2: f2 $o a2 $== b $o b1
Lift b1 f1


      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
A1, A2, B1, B2, C1, C2: A
f1: A1 $-> B1
g1: B1 $-> C1
f2: A2 $-> B2
g2: B2 $-> C2
a: A1 $-> A2
b: B1 $-> B2
c: C1 $-> C2
sq1: b $o f1 $== f2 $o a
Epic0: Epic a
Monic0: Monic c
Monic1: Monic b
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f2 g2
P: A
b1: elt P B1
a2: elt P A2
la2: f2 $o a2 $== b $o b1
a1: elt P A1
la1: a $o a1 $== a2
Lift b1 f1


      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
A1, A2, B1, B2, C1, C2: A
f1: A1 $-> B1
g1: B1 $-> C1
f2: A2 $-> B2
g2: B2 $-> C2
a: A1 $-> A2
b: B1 $-> B2
c: C1 $-> C2
sq1: b $o f1 $== f2 $o a
Epic0: Epic a
Monic0: Monic c
Monic1: Monic b
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f2 g2
P: A
b1: elt P B1
a2: elt P A2
la2: f2 $o a2 $== b $o b1
a1: elt P A1
la1: a $o a1 $== a2
f1 $o a1 $== b1

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
A1, A2, B1, B2, C1, C2: A
f1: A1 $-> B1
g1: B1 $-> C1
f2: A2 $-> B2
g2: B2 $-> C2
a: A1 $-> A2
b: B1 $-> B2
c: C1 $-> C2
sq1: b $o f1 $== f2 $o a
Epic0: Epic a
Monic0: Monic c
Monic1: Monic b
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f2 g2
P: A
b1: elt P B1
a2: elt P A2
la2: f2 $o a2 $== b $o b1
a1: elt P A1
la1: a $o a1 $== a2
b $o (f1 $o a1) $== b $o b1

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
A1, A2, B1, B2, C1, C2: A
f1: A1 $-> B1
g1: B1 $-> C1
f2: A2 $-> B2
g2: B2 $-> C2
a: A1 $-> A2
b: B1 $-> B2
c: C1 $-> C2
sq1: b $o f1 $== f2 $o a
Epic0: Epic a
Monic0: Monic c
Monic1: Monic b
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f2 g2
P: A
b1: elt P B1
a2: elt P A2
la2: f2 $o a2 $== b $o b1
a1: elt P A1
la1: a $o a1 $== a2
f2 $o (a $o a1) $== b $o b1

      
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
A1, A2, B1, B2, C1, C2: A
f1: A1 $-> B1
g1: B1 $-> C1
f2: A2 $-> B2
g2: B2 $-> C2
a: A1 $-> A2
b: B1 $-> B2
c: C1 $-> C2
sq1: b $o f1 $== f2 $o a
Epic0: Epic a
Monic0: Monic c
Monic1: Monic b
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact f2 g2
P: A
b1: elt P B1
a2: elt P A2
la2: f2 $o a2 $== b $o b1
a1: elt P A1
la1: a $o a1 $== a2
f2 $o a2 $== b $o b1

      exact la2.
  Defined.

End TwoByThree.

(** ** The diamond lemma *)

Section Diamond.

  Context {Ae : Type} `{H0 : Is1Cat Ae} `{!IsAbEpiStable Ae}.

  Context {A B C D E F G H : Ae}
    (ab : A $-> B) (bc : B $-> C) (cd : C $-> D) (de : D $-> E)
    (ah : A $-> H) (hg : H $-> G) (gf : G $-> F) (fe : F $-> E)
    (hb : H $-> B) (bd : B $-> D) (hf : H $-> F) (fd : F $-> D)
    (tru : ab $== hb $o ah) (trr : bd $== cd $o bc)
    (trd : fe $== de $o fd) (trl : hf $== gf $o hg)
    (sq : bd $o hb $== fd $o hf)
    `{!CatIsAbExact ab bc} `{!CatIsAbExact cd de}
    `{!CatIsAbExact ah hg} `{!CatIsAbExact gf fe}
    `{!Epic hg} `{!Monic cd}.

  (** The diagram has the shape:
<<
          A
         / \
        /   \
       v     v
      H ----> B
     /|       |\
    / |       | \
   v  |       |  v
  G   |       |   C
   \  |       |  /
    \ |       | /
     vv       vv
      F ----> D
       \     /
        \   /
         v v
          E
>>
  where each diagonal is assumed to be exact. *)

  (** If the map [H $-> B] is mono, then so is [G $-> F]. *)
  
Ae: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph Ae
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph Ae
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat Ae
H0: Is1Cat Ae
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable Ae
A, B, C, D, E, F, G, H: Ae
ab: A $-> B
bc: B $-> C
cd: C $-> D
de: D $-> E
ah: A $-> H
hg: H $-> G
gf: G $-> F
fe: F $-> E
hb: H $-> B
bd: B $-> D
hf: H $-> F
fd: F $-> D
tru: ab $== hb $o ah
trr: bd $== cd $o bc
trd: fe $== de $o fd
trl: hf $== gf $o hg
sq: bd $o hb $== fd $o hf
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact ab bc
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact cd de
CatIsAbExact2: CatIsAbExact ah hg
CatIsAbExact3: CatIsAbExact gf fe
Epic0: Epic hg
Monic0: Monic cd
Monic1: Monic hb
Monic gf

trr: bd $== cd $o bc
trd: fe $== de $o fd

sq: bd $o hb $== fd $o hf

Ae: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph Ae
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph Ae
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat Ae
H0: Is1Cat Ae
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable Ae
A, B, C, D, E, F, G, H: Ae
ab: A $-> B
bc: B $-> C
cd: C $-> D
de: D $-> E
ah: A $-> H
hg: H $-> G
gf: G $-> F
fe: F $-> E
hb: H $-> B
bd: B $-> D
hf: H $-> F
fd: F $-> D
tru: ab $== hb $o ah
trr: bd $== cd $o bc
trl: hf $== gf $o hg
sq: bd $o hb $== fd $o hf
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact ab bc
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact cd de
CatIsAbExact2: CatIsAbExact ah hg
CatIsAbExact3: CatIsAbExact gf fe
Epic0: Epic hg
Monic0: Monic cd
Monic1: Monic hb
forall (P : Ae) (b : elt P G), gf $o b $== 0 -> b $== 0

IsGraph0: IsGraph Ae

tru: ab $== hb $o ah
trr: bd $== cd $o bc

CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact ab bc
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact cd de

lh: hg $o h $== g

Ae: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph Ae

H0: Is1Cat Ae

ab: A $-> B
bc: B $-> C
cd: C $-> D
de: D $-> E
ah: A $-> H
hg: H $-> G
gf: G $-> F
fe: F $-> E
hb: H $-> B
bd: B $-> D
hf: H $-> F
fd: F $-> D
tru: ab $== hb $o ah
trr: bd $== cd $o bc
trl: hf $== gf $o hg
sq: bd $o hb $== fd $o hf
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact ab bc
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact cd de

CatIsAbExact3: CatIsAbExact gf fe

lh: hg $o h $== g
bc $o (hb $o h) $== 0
Ae: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph Ae
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph Ae
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat Ae
H0: Is1Cat Ae
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable Ae
A, B, C, D, E, F, G, H: Ae
ab: A $-> B
bc: B $-> C
cd: C $-> D
de: D $-> E
ah: A $-> H
hg: H $-> G
gf: G $-> F
fe: F $-> E
hb: H $-> B
bd: B $-> D
hf: H $-> F
fd: F $-> D
tru: ab $== hb $o ah
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact ab bc
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact cd de
CatIsAbExact2: CatIsAbExact ah hg
CatIsAbExact3: CatIsAbExact gf fe
Epic0: Epic hg
Monic0: Monic cd
Monic1: Monic hb
P: Ae
h: elt P H
g: elt P G
lh: hg $o h $== g
a: elt P A
la: ab $o a $== hb $o h
g $== 0

    
Ae: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph Ae
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph Ae
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat Ae
H0: Is1Cat Ae
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable Ae
A, B, C, D, E, F, G, H: Ae
ab: A $-> B
bc: B $-> C
cd: C $-> D
de: D $-> E
ah: A $-> H
hg: H $-> G
gf: G $-> F
fe: F $-> E
hb: H $-> B
bd: B $-> D
hf: H $-> F
fd: F $-> D
tru: ab $== hb $o ah
trr: bd $== cd $o bc
trl: hf $== gf $o hg
sq: bd $o hb $== fd $o hf
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact ab bc
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact cd de
CatIsAbExact2: CatIsAbExact ah hg
CatIsAbExact3: CatIsAbExact gf fe
Epic0: Epic hg

Monic1: Monic hb
P: Ae
g: elt P G
p: gf $o g $== 0
h: elt P H
lh: hg $o h $== g
bc $o (hb $o h) $== 0

hf: H $-> F

trr: bd $== cd $o bc

p: gf $o g $== 0
h: elt P H
lh: hg $o h $== g
fd $o 0 $== 0

      apply postcomp_zero. 
Ae: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph Ae
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph Ae
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat Ae
H0: Is1Cat Ae
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable Ae
A, B, C, D, E, F, G, H: Ae
ab: A $-> B
bc: B $-> C
cd: C $-> D
de: D $-> E
ah: A $-> H
hg: H $-> G
gf: G $-> F
fe: F $-> E
hb: H $-> B
bd: B $-> D
hf: H $-> F
fd: F $-> D
tru: ab $== hb $o ah
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact ab bc
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact cd de
CatIsAbExact2: CatIsAbExact ah hg
CatIsAbExact3: CatIsAbExact gf fe
Epic0: Epic hg
Monic0: Monic cd
Monic1: Monic hb
P: Ae
h: elt P H
g: elt P G
lh: hg $o h $== g
a: elt P A
la: ab $o a $== hb $o h
g $== 0

ab: A $-> B
bc: B $-> C
cd: C $-> D
de: D $-> E
ah: A $-> H
hg: H $-> G
gf: G $-> F
fe: F $-> E
hb: H $-> B
bd: B $-> D
hf: H $-> F

hb $o (ah $o a) $== hb $o h

IsGraph0: IsGraph Ae

Is01Cat0: Is01Cat Ae
H0: Is1Cat Ae
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable Ae
A, B, C, D, E, F, G, H: Ae
ab: A $-> B
bc: B $-> C
cd: C $-> D
de: D $-> E
ah: A $-> H
hg: H $-> G
gf: G $-> F
fe: F $-> E
hb: H $-> B
bd: B $-> D
hf: H $-> F

h: elt P H
g: elt P G
lh: hg $o h $== g
a: elt P A
la: ab $o a $== hb $o h
la': ah $o a $== h
0 $o a $== 0

    apply precomp_zero.
  Defined.

  (** If the map [F $-> D] is epi, then so is the map [B $-> C]. *)
  
Ae: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph Ae
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph Ae
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat Ae
H0: Is1Cat Ae

ab: A $-> B
bc: B $-> C
cd: C $-> D
de: D $-> E
ah: A $-> H
hg: H $-> G
gf: G $-> F
fe: F $-> E
hb: H $-> B
bd: B $-> D
hf: H $-> F
fd: F $-> D
tru: ab $== hb $o ah
trr: bd $== cd $o bc
trd: fe $== de $o fd
trl: hf $== gf $o hg
sq: bd $o hb $== fd $o hf
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact ab bc
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact cd de
CatIsAbExact2: CatIsAbExact ah hg
CatIsAbExact3: CatIsAbExact gf fe
Epic0: Epic hg
Monic0: Monic cd
Epic1: Epic fd
Epic bc

de $o (fd $o f) $== 0

      
Ae: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph Ae
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph Ae
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat Ae
H0: Is1Cat Ae
IsAbEpiStable0: IsAbEpiStable Ae
A, B, C, D, E, F, G, H: Ae
ab: A $-> B
bc: B $-> C
cd: C $-> D
de: D $-> E
ah: A $-> H
hg: H $-> G
gf: G $-> F
fe: F $-> E
hb: H $-> B
bd: B $-> D
hf: H $-> F
fd: F $-> D
trr: bd $== cd $o bc
trd: fe $== de $o fd
trl: hf $== gf $o hg
sq: bd $o hb $== fd $o hf
CatIsAbExact0: CatIsAbExact ab bc
CatIsAbExact1: CatIsAbExact cd de
CatIsAbExact2: CatIsAbExact ah hg
CatIsAbExact3: CatIsAbExact gf fe
Epic0: Epic hg
Monic0: Monic cd
Epic1: Epic fd
P: Ae
f: elt P F
c: elt P C
lf: fd $o f $== cd $o c
de $o (cd $o c) $== 0

    by rewrite cat_assoc, lh, lg, lf.
  Defined.

End Diamond.

(** ** The baby dragon lemmas *)

Section Baby_Dragon.

  (** The dragon lemmas involve diagrams which in general have the same shape, but can be elongated or shortened.  For example, the case [n = 2] below has shape:
<<
          top 0     top 1    top 2
          /   \     /  \     /  \
         /     \   /    \   /    \
        v       v v      v v      v
       mid 0   mid 1    mid 2    mid 3
         \     /   \     /  \     /
          \   /     \   /    \   /
           v v       v v      v v
          bot 0     bot 1    bot 2
>>
  where all the diagonal sequences are exact, the maps [top 0 $-> middle 0], [middle 1 $-> bot 1], and [middle 2 $-> bot 2] are epic, and the maps [top 0 $-> middle 1], [top 1 $-> middle 2], and [middle 3 $-> bot 2] are mono.

  For general [n], the diagram will have a similar shape, with [n + 1] objects in the top and bottom rows. *)

  (** The baby dragon lemma has an epi statement and a mono statement.  We shall first prove the epi part, then the mono part.  To do the epi part, we will show that if the map [middle 0 $-> bot 0] is epi, then so is [top 2 $-> middle 3].  Due to the lack of symmetry at the edges of the diagram, we need to prove a more general statement first to make the induction go through. *)

  Context {A : Type} `{IsAbEpiStable A}.

  (** We make a datatype for the above diagram with [n+1] squares. *)
  Record BabyDragon {n : nat} := {
    top : Fin n.+1 -> A;
    mid : Fin n.+2 -> A;
    bot : Fin n.+1 -> A;
    top_l (k : Fin n.+1) : top k $-> mid (fin_incl k);
    top_r (k : Fin n.+1) : top k $-> mid (fsucc k);
    bot_l (k : Fin n.+1) : mid (fin_incl k) $-> bot k;
    bot_r (k : Fin n.+1) : mid (fsucc k) $-> bot k;
    sq (k : Fin n.+1) : (bot_l k) $o (top_l k) $== (bot_r k) $o (top_r k);
    exact_r (k : Fin n) :: CatIsAbExact (top_r (fin_incl k)) (bot_l (fsucc k));
    exact_l (k : Fin n) :: CatIsAbExact (top_l (fsucc k)) (bot_r (fin_incl k))
  }.
  (** Note that [bot_l k] refers to the bottom-left map in the [k]th square, which points down and to the *right*. *)

  Arguments BabyDragon : clear implicits.

  (** In order to make an inductive argument, we need two ways of truncating a diagram.  This one drops the right-hand square, keeping the left [n+1] squares. *)
  
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
n: nat
D: BabyDragon n.+1
BabyDragon n

  
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
n: nat
D: BabyDragon n.+1
BabyDragon n

k: Fin n.+1

?Goal $->
?Goal0@{k:=match k with
           | inl i' => inl (fsucc i')
           | inr tt => inr tt
           end}

H: Is1Cat A

?Goal0@{k:=match k with
           | inl i' => inl (fsucc i')
           | inr tt => inr tt
           end} $->
?Goal1
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
n: nat
D: BabyDragon n.+1
k: Fin n.+1
?Goal4 $o ?Goal2 $== ?Goal5 $o ?Goal3

IsGraph0: IsGraph A

H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
n: nat

k: Fin n
CatIsAbExact ?Goal3@{k:=fin_incl k} ?Goal4@{k:=fsucc k}

IsGraph0: IsGraph A

H: Is1Cat A

A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
n: nat
D: BabyDragon n.+1
k: Fin n.+1
A
 exact (top D (fin_incl k)).
    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A

H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A

A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A

H0: IsAbEpiStable A

A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
n: nat
D: BabyDragon n.+1
k: Fin n.+1
top D (fin_incl k) $-> mid D (fin_incl (fin_incl k))
 exact (top_l _ (fin_incl k)).
    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
n: nat
D: BabyDragon n.+1
k: Fin n.+1
top D (fin_incl k) $->
mid D
  (fin_incl match k with
            | inl i' => inl (fsucc i')
            | inr tt => inr tt
            end)
 exact (top_r _ (fin_incl k)).
    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
n: nat
D: BabyDragon n.+1
k: Fin n.+1
mid D (fin_incl (fin_incl k)) $-> bot D (fin_incl k)
 exact (bot_l _ (fin_incl k)).
    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
n: nat
D: BabyDragon n.+1
k: Fin n.+1
mid D
  (fin_incl match k with
            | inl i' => inl (fsucc i')
            | inr tt => inr tt
            end) $->
bot D (fin_incl k)
 exact (bot_r _ (fin_incl k)).
    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
n: nat
D: BabyDragon n.+1
k: Fin n.+1
bot_l D (fin_incl k) $o top_l D (fin_incl k) $==
bot_r D (fin_incl k) $o top_r D (fin_incl k)
 exact (sq _ (fin_incl k)).
    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
n: nat
D: BabyDragon n.+1
k: Fin n
CatIsAbExact (top_r D (fin_incl (fin_incl k))) (bot_l D (fin_incl (fsucc k)))
 exact (exact_r _ (fin_incl k)).
    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
n: nat
D: BabyDragon n.+1
k: Fin n
CatIsAbExact (top_l D (fin_incl (fsucc k))) (bot_r D (fin_incl (fin_incl k)))
 exact (exact_l _ (fin_incl k)).
  Defined.

  (** This one drops the left-hand square, keeping the right [n+1] squares. *)

A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
n: nat
D: BabyDragon n.+1
k: Fin n.+1
top D (fsucc k) $-> mid D (fsucc (fin_incl k))
 exact (top_l _ (fsucc k)).
    
A: Type
IsGraph0: IsGraph A
Is2Graph0: Is2Graph A
Is01Cat0: Is01Cat A
H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
n: nat
D: BabyDragon n.+1
k: Fin n.+1
top D (fsucc k) $->
mid D (fsucc match k with
             | inl i' => inl (fsucc i')
             | inr tt => inr tt
             end)
 exact (top_r _ (fsucc k)).

IsGraph0: IsGraph A

H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
n: nat
D: BabyDragon n.+1
k: Fin n.+1
mid D (fsucc (fin_incl k)) $-> bot D (fsucc k)
 exact (bot_l _ (fsucc k)).

n: nat
D: BabyDragon n.+1
k: Fin n.+1
mid D (fsucc match k with
             | inl i' => inl (fsucc i')
             | inr tt => inr tt
             end) $->
bot D (fsucc k)
 exact (bot_r _ (fsucc k)).

k: Fin n.+1
bot_l D (fsucc k) $o top_l D (fsucc k) $==
bot_r D (fsucc k) $o top_r D (fsucc k)
 exact (sq _ (fsucc k)).

H: Is1Cat A
H0: IsAbEpiStable A
